patch.value:
## Evidence

Exact master run 29868743104 failed before version mutation or publication with Unknown command changelog.

## Definition of done

- Provision latest pm-changelog in dry-run and publishing paths.
- Pass local and clean hosted non-publishing rehearsal.
- Retain zero commit, tag, push, or package publication in dry-run mode.
Auto-release dry run omits pm-changelog installation on clean runners

The exact-master non-publishing Auto Release dispatch fails on a clean GitHub runner because scripts/release/auto-release.mjs skips installLatestChangelog() when --dry-run is set, then invokes an unavailable pm changelog command.

A clean-runner workflow_dispatch with dry_run=true and allow_same_day_release=true installs the latest pm-changelog, generates the candidate changelog, completes all release gates, and does not commit, tag, push, or publish
Exact failed workflow job log identifies Unknown command changelog after the dry-run-only installation branch
Keep the non-publishing release rehearsal trustworthy on clean infrastructure.
Prevents false release failures and ensures scheduled release prerequisites are exercised before publication.
Hosted auto-release dry runs complete end to end while preserving their no-publish contract.
Exact final master proof run 29868743104 exposed the clean-runner gap.
GitHub Actions Auto Release workflow_dispatch on a clean ubuntu runner
Dispatch auto-release.yml on master with push=false, dry_run=true, allow_same_day_release=true; observe scripts/release/auto-release.mjs invoke pm changelog without first installing pm-changelog.
Dry-run and publishing modes both provision the latest changelog generator before generating release notes.
Dry-run mode skips installLatestChangelog and fails with Unknown command changelog.
No publication occurred; maintainers cannot rely on the hosted dry-run rehearsal.

value.author: codex-root
value.text: Exact public evidence: https://github.com/unbraind/homeassistant-cli/actions/runs/29868743104 job 88763366091. The failure occurs before version mutation or publication and contains no private data.

value.author: codex-root
value.text: Keep dry-run non-publishing. Installing a build-time pm extension is permitted; commit/tag/push/package publication remain disabled.

value.author: codex-root
value.text: Clean local workspaces can mask missing extension provisioning because pm-changelog is already installed; release rehearsals require clean-runner proof.

value.note: Provision latest pm-changelog before both dry-run and release generation

value.author: codex-root
value.text: First hosted repair run 29869217387 proved pm-changelog now installs and generation starts on a clean runner. The full release gate then exposed missing runner prerequisites: scripts/release/verify-release.sh could not find rg or trivy. The workflow now provisions ripgrep, shellcheck, and the current official setup-trivy v0.3.1 pinned to commit 81e5143, with current Trivy v0.72.0.
